title: AnAbnormalCircumstance
description: An Abnormal Circumstance, a mod developed for the Orchard of Avalon.
body:
# Important Note  
**Most features in this mod are *not obtainable in regular Survival*.**  
This mod is designed specifically for **The Orchard of Avalon** Minecraft server.  
Join the Discord to experience the mod as intended.


Discord link at the right side of the webpage

---

# Vannilla Features

## Vanilla Changes
- Removed **string duping**  
- **Ender Pearl** cooldown set to 15s
- **Trident Use** cooldown set to 15s  
- Increased all **Protection enchantments variants'** max level to **V**  
- Added **/server_time** command  
- Added new **crafting recipes**: Sponge, Green Dye, Echo Shard, Heart of the Sea, Light Blue Shulker Box (pre-End), Chorus Fruit (pre-End), End Stone (pre-End)

---

# Main Content

## Magic System
- Fully custom magic framework with **30 spells**
- **4 Elements:** Hydromancy, Geomancy, Aeromancy, Pyromancy  
- **5 Tiers** of magic, with one spell slot per tier  
- Tier 4–5 spells require special criteria before they can be bound  
- Highly customizable spell loadouts  

## Altar Crafting
- Unique ritual crafting system  
- Place items into an altar, wait **15 minutes**, receive ritual output  

## Weapons & Items
- **4 Legendary** weapons with custom abilities, passives, and stats above Netherite (Craftable from the altar) 
- **6 Champion** weapons surpassing even Legendaries  
- **Karamit** offhand item: grants **+3 melee attack damage** (An alternative offhand item to shields)
- **Sparks:** instant-use potion type (stack to 16), ⅓ duration of regular potions; brewable using pearls (Just like MCCI)
- **Dungeon Items:** mana crystals, gold coins, jewelry, orc/brood drops, silver keys, bottled lightning, silver arrows, and more (most of these items are either used in crafting recipes or custom item interactions on the official server)

## New Mobs
- **Orcs:** Warrior + Javelin-Thrower variants  
- **Brood:** Arachnid-like creatures

## Advancements & Status Effects
- Main Advancements: **Brood Slayer** and **Orc Slayer** each grant **+2 permanent hearts**  
- **New Status Effects:**  
  - **Bleed:** % max-health damage over time  
  - **Stun:** freezes movement + prevents attacks/item use  
  - **Confusion:** reverses WASD controls  

---
